defect.summary: GET /projects returns HTTP 500 when a freelancer owns a project with billable_rate=null; projects with a rate render fine.
repro_steps: Sign in; own >=1 project with billable_rate = null (rate omitted / pre-rates data).
Observed: HTTP 500. Expected: 200, list renders every project.
defect.expected_behavior: AC6 (req_ref R6): the freelancer's projects appear in the project list. The list must render every owned project, including one whose billable_rate is null.

reproduction.trace: GET /projects -> wsgi.urlpatterns 'projects' -> _view_project_management -> dispatch_project_request -> _ProjectManagementAdapter.handle_request: parts==['projects'], method GET -> store.list(owner_id) -> _render(projects). _render builds each <li> with f-string field {p['billable_rate']:.2f}. A project whose billable_rate is None makes the ':.2f' numeric format spec raise TypeError: unsupported format string passed to NoneType.__format__.
reproduction.observed: TypeError raised in _render on the null-rate project; uncaught -> HTTP 500 for the whole list.
reproduction.expected: HTTP 200; list renders every project, including the null-rate one.
reproduction.note: No interpreter in env (Rule 5: runtime/harness gap is not a defect); reproduction is by static-trace + golden comparison, as the greenfield fixtures are.

localization.surface: single method — _render; the only edit site the repair needs (BLAST_RADIUS candidate)

root_cause.cause: _ProjectManagementAdapter._render (src/freelancer_app/wsgi.py) formats each project's billable_rate with the numeric format spec ':.2f' and direct-indexes p['billable_rate']. When billable_rate is null (None), ':.2f' raises TypeError, so rendering the whole project list aborts and GET /projects returns HTTP 500. The render code applies a numeric format to a value the data model allows to be null, with no null guard — the contract CT9 (server-rendered project list) and AC6 are satisfiable and correct; the defect is the rendering implementation.
root_cause.mechanism: null billable_rate reaches a ':.2f' numeric format spec with no null guard; the resulting TypeError is not a declared CT9 failure mode (callee-error = RuntimeError), so dispatch_project_request's except RuntimeError does not catch it and it propagates to an unhandled 500.
root_cause.symptom_vs_cause: symptom = GET /projects 500; cause = null-unsafe rate formatting in _render

regression_surface.note: AC6 (R6) exercises the same _render path for rated projects plus project create/edit/delete; the repair must keep rated-project rendering + CRUD green (BF4). Scoped to BLAST_RADIUS, not the whole inherited suite (Risk R4).

repair_behavior_gap.question: What should a null billable_rate render as — blank, zero, or the rate field omitted?
repair_behavior_gap.owner: GAP-DETECT (bugfix hunt site); not resolved here
repair_behavior_gap.note: Crash root cause is localized and unambiguous, but the baseline is silent on how a null rate should display. DIAGNOSE localizes the cause only; GAP-DETECT hunts the correct-behavior fork, SYNTHESIZE folds ROOT_CAUSE (H10, lane).
